ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "chan_id" TEXT /* Channel identifier associated with the anomaly */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Spacecraft identifier associated with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_sequences" TEXT /* Sequences of data points indicating the anomaly */,
  "class" TEXT /* Classification of the anomaly (e.g., contextual, point) */,
  "num_values" INTEGER /* Number of values affected by the anomaly */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Severity level of the anomaly */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_chan_id FOREIGN KEY ("chan_id") REFERENCES channels ("chan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecrafts ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES anomaly_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES anomaly_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecrafts" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the spacecraft was launched */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission conducted by the spacecraft */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft's mission */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Operator identifier associated with the spacecraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the anomaly class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the anomaly class (e.g., contextual, point) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* Parent class identifier for hierarchical relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "chan_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the channel */,
  "chan_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel's purpose */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anomaly related to this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who generated the report */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of findings related to the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_reports_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team identifier associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Specific resource or page accessed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the severity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the severity level means */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Numerical threshold value for the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related anomaly */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the time of anomaly detection */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric value */,
  "threshold_min" REAL /* Minimum threshold value for the metric */,
  "threshold_max" REAL /* Maximum threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_metrics_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution action */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anomaly that was resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution action was performed */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken to resolve the anomaly */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who verified the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_resolutions_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_resolutions_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team identifier */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User identifier */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
